## Instructions
File: CausalSmith/CausalSmith/Substrate/MeasureMomentResidualEnvelope/Attainment.lean (project root /<repo-root>/CausalSmith). Replace ONLY the nine `sorry`s; do NOT change any statement. Verify with `lake build CausalSmith.Substrate.MeasureMomentResidualEnvelope.Attainment` (no errors). Work incrementally; `lake` first-build is ~60s.

Setup (all in the file): `u := maximizingRoot v`, with `hmem := maximizingRoot_mem v hv0 hv1 : u ‚ąą Set.Ioo (v^2) v` (so `v^2 < u < v`, and `0<u`, `u<1`). `x := extremalSupp v = ME.extremalMid u (v^2) = (u^2 - 2*u*v^2 + v^2)/(2*u*(1-u))`. Weights: `extremalW1 v = (u - v^2)/(x*(1-x))`, `extremalW2 v = (v^2 - u*x)/(1-x)`, `extremalW0 v = 1 - extremalW1 v - extremalW2 v`. `extremalMeasure v = ENNReal.ofReal (extremalW0 v) ‚ÄĘ Measure.dirac 0 + ENNReal.ofReal (extremalW1 v) ‚ÄĘ Measure.dirac x + ENNReal.ofReal (extremalW2 v) ‚ÄĘ Measure.dirac 1`. `moment őľ k = ‚ąę y, y^k ‚ąāőľ`.

Prove in this order:

(1) `extremalSupp_mem : x ‚ąą Set.Ioo 0 1`. Unfold `extremalSupp, ME.extremalMid`. Denominator `2*u*(1-u) > 0`. Show `0 < x` and `x < 1` by `rw [div_lt_iff, lt_div_iff]`-style or `constructor` + `div_pos` / `(div_lt_one _).2`, with numerator/denominator polynomial inequalities closed by `nlinarith [hmem.1, hmem.2, ...]` (facts `v^2<u<v<1`, `0<v`). Numerator `u^2 - 2*u*v^2 + v^2 > 0` and `< 2*u*(1-u)`.

(2) `extremalW_nonneg : 0 ‚Č§ extremalW0 v ‚ąß 0 ‚Č§ extremalW1 v ‚ąß 0 ‚Č§ extremalW2 v`. Use `extremalSupp_mem` (call it `hx : x ‚ąą Ioo 0 1`). `w1>0`: numerator `u-v^2>0`, denom `x*(1-x)>0`. `w2‚Č•0`: `v^2 - u*x ‚Č• 0` (nlinarith) over denom `1-x>0`. `w0‚Č•0`: `extremalW1 v + extremalW2 v ‚Č§ 1`; unfold, `field_simp` to a single fraction and `nlinarith`/`div_le_one`. These may need care; establish `x‚Č†0`, `1-x‚Č†0`, `u‚Č†0`, `1-u‚Č†0` first.

(3) `extremalMeasure_moment_pow {k} (hk : 1 ‚Č§ k) : moment (extremalMeasure v) k = extremalW1 v * x^k + extremalW2 v`. Unfold `moment, extremalMeasure`. Compute `‚ąę y^k ‚ąā(a‚ÄĘdirac p + b‚ÄĘdirac q + c‚ÄĘdirac r)` via `MeasureTheory.integral_add_measure` (needs integrability of `fun y=>y^k` wrt each finite scaled-dirac measure ‚ÄĒ `Integrable` of a continuous fn wrt a finite measure; each `ENNReal.ofReal w ‚ÄĘ Measure.dirac p` is finite), `MeasureTheory.integral_smul_measure` (gives `(ENNReal.ofReal w).toReal ‚ÄĘ ‚ąę ... ‚ąādirac p`), and `MeasureTheory.integral_dirac` (`‚ąę f ‚ąādirac p = f p`). Then `(ENNReal.ofReal w).toReal = w` by `ENNReal.toReal_ofReal` using `w ‚Č• 0` from `extremalW_nonneg`. Use `(0:‚ĄĚ)^k = 0` (`zero_pow` with `hk`‚Č†0), `(1:‚ĄĚ)^k = 1`. Simplify to `w0*0 + w1*x^k + w2*1 = w1*x^k + w2`. (If integrability lemmas are awkward, prove `Integrable (fun y=>y^k) (ENNReal.ofReal w ‚ÄĘ Measure.dirac p)` via `MeasureTheory.integrable_smul_measure` + `integrable_dirac`/`MeasureTheory.Integrable` on a finite measure.)

(4) `extremalMeasure_isProb : IsProbabilityMeasure (extremalMeasure v)`. Provide `‚ü®?_‚ü©` proving `(extremalMeasure v) Set.univ = 1`. Unfold; `Measure.add_apply`, `Measure.smul_apply`, `MeasureTheory.dirac_apply' _ MeasurableSet.univ` or `Measure.dirac_univ` (each dirac univ = 1). Get `ENNReal.ofReal w0 + ENNReal.ofReal w1 + ENNReal.ofReal w2`. Combine via `‚Üź ENNReal.ofReal_add` (needs `w‚Č•0` from `extremalW_nonneg`) to `ENNReal.ofReal (w0+w1+w2)`; `w0+w1+w2 = 1` by `unfold extremalW0; ring`; then `ENNReal.ofReal_one`.

(5) `extremalMeasure_supp : ‚ąÄŠĶź y ‚ąā(extremalMeasure v), y ‚ąą Set.Icc (0:‚ĄĚ) 1`. Suffices the measure of `{y | y ‚ąČ Icc 0 1}` is 0. Rewrite `ae_iff`; unfold the measure; each `dirac p` charges `{y|y‚ąČIcc 0 1}` with 0 because `p ‚ąą Icc 0 1` (p ‚ąą {0, x, 1}; `x‚ąąIcc 0 1` from `extremalSupp_mem`). Use `MeasureTheory.dirac_apply'`/`Measure.dirac_apply_of_mem` (or `dirac p S = 0` when `p ‚ąČ S`). Alternatively use `MeasureTheory.ae_of_forall...` ‚ÄĒ simplest: `refine ae_of_all _ ?_` is wrong (not all points). Use the complement-measure-zero route.

(6) `extremalMeasure_moment1 : moment (extremalMeasure v) 1 = u`. `rw [extremalMeasure_moment_pow v hv0 hv1 (le_refl 1)]`; goal `extremalW1 v * x^1 + extremalW2 v = u`. Unfold weights and `extremalSupp/extremalMid`, establish nonzero denominators (`x‚Č†0,1-x‚Č†0,u‚Č†0,1-u‚Č†0`), `field_simp; ring` (this is the defining first-moment constraint `w1*x + w2 = u`).

(7) `extremalMeasure_moment2 : moment (extremalMeasure v) 2 = v^2`. Same pattern, `k=2`: `w1*x^2 + w2 = v^2`. `field_simp; ring`.

(8) `extremalMeasure_moment3 : moment (...) 3 = ME.extremalM3 u (v^2)`. `rw [extremalMeasure_moment_pow ... (by norm_num : 1‚Č§3)]`; unfold `extremalW1, extremalW2, extremalSupp, ME.extremalMid, ME.extremalM3`; `field_simp` with all denominators nonzero; `ring`. This is a rational-function identity; if `ring` is slow, `ring_nf` then `nlinarith`/`linear_combination` may help, but it should be pure `ring` after `field_simp`.

(9) `extremalMeasure_moment4 : moment (...) 4 = ME.extremalM4 u (v^2)`. Same as (8) with `ME.extremalM4`; heaviest `ring`.

Nonzero facts you will reuse: from `hmem` get `hu0 : (0:‚ĄĚ)<u` (`lt_trans (by positivity) hmem.1`), `hu1 : u<1`, `u‚Č†0`, `1-u‚Č†0`; from `extremalSupp_mem` get `x‚Č†0`, `1-x‚Č†0`. Introduce them once per proof before `field_simp`.

Use the lean-lsp MCP tools to check your proof (diagnostics/goal). When done, output a SHORT plain-text report: which decls you closed, which remain, and any blocker. No JSON required.
